heading: Consultation on grain marketing
label: 1736l Consultation on grain marketing
text: Congress encourages the Secretary of Agriculture, in coordination with other appropriate Federal departments and agencies, to continue to consult with representatives of other major grain exporting nations toward the goal of establishing more orderly marketing of grain and achieving higher farm income for producers of grain.
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Agriculture and Food Act of 1981, and not as part of the Food for Peace Act which comprises this chapter.
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 22, 1981section 1801 of Pub. L. 97–98section 4301 of this title
